title: Would love integration between Monday and RPOST-RSIGN like Docusign
excerpt: Now that RPost-Rsign esignature platform is in the top 3 of this space, I think it is time that Monday build and integration with RSign similar to what they have for docusign. To be able to track esignature or send strai…

posts.author: u175181 (PM Scrum)
posts.cookedHtml: Now that RPost-Rsign esignature platform is in the top 3 of this space, I think it is time that Monday build and integration with RSign similar to what they have for docusign. To be able to track esignature or send straight from Monday would be fantastic.
